title: Pokemon Overcharge
body:
In this datapack you will find various movements, some abilities, and only one item for the moment.

NOTE: For the moment, this datapack does not edit the base Pokémon to be able to learn these moves or abilities, as it is designed for a sandbox environment. If you want more information about the moves, you will find it on the [Megas Showdown Discord](https://discord.gg/Df5JCTGEHk).

1. Does this datapack have a translation into Spanish? Answer: **YES!**

2. Important: If you are using another datapack that modifies the paralysis condition, the "Electro Ears" movement will not work properly.
